SOURCE: 15041689.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (15041689.pdf)
SUMMARY: HR Professional with over 15 years of experience in multi-unit businesses, expertise in developing and implementing HR plans, conflict resolution, employment protocol compliance, and staffing needs.
SKILLS: ADP, Benefits, counseling, database, employee relations, hiring, HRIS, HR, Director, meetings, Enterprise, newspapers, payroll, PeopleSoft 8.0, PeopleSoft HRMS, Performance management, personnel, policies, processes, Recruitment, reporting, safety, TV

SOURCE: 15041689.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Director
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: November 2007 - October 2014
DESCRIPTION: Managed HR for New Kent horse track and 8 off-track betting sites, approximately 650 employees. Ensured compliance with federal and state laws, provided employee relations guidance, created fair policies, conducted performance assessments, and managed benefits administration.

SOURCE: 15041689.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: October 2004 - March 2008
DESCRIPTION: Managed HR for 30 TV stations and 1 communications company across the Southeast, approximately 2,000 employees. Handled FMLA, STD, LTD, and Worker's Comp, maintained job requisition database, provided recruitment/retention support.

SOURCE: 15041689.pdf
JOB TITLE: Benefits Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: February 2001 - January 2004
DESCRIPTION: Administered benefit plans for 27 newspapers and TV stations, approximately 3,500 employees. Processed enrollments daily using PeopleSoft 8.0, assisted with annual Open Enrollment.

SOURCE: 15041689.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2004 - October 2004
DESCRIPTION: Managed HR for 4 daily and 2 weekly newspapers, approximately 400 employees. Reported payroll biweekly, recruited for open positions, maintained PeopleSoft HRMS database.
